title: plantago myosuros subsp. humilior
intro: Plantago myosuros subsp. humilior, also known as low-growing plantain or small plantain, is a subspecies of the plantain plant, which is a type of herbaceous perennial plant belonging to the plantain family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Plantago myosuros subsp. humilior include soothing irritated skin, treating wounds and burns, and reducing swelling and pain. Herbal preparations of this plant typically include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
